name: GURPS Lite
license: Original mechanics references; GURPS is a registered trademark of Steve Jackson Games Incorporated. Stat-vs-3d6 roll-under mechanics are common to the generic-system family; no verbatim SJG text reproduced.
summary: Generic universal stat-vs-3d6 roll-under system. Each attribute and skill has a target number; roll 3d6 and succeed if the total is at or under that number. Bonuses raise the target (the cap of success), penalties lower it. Critical success on a natural 3 or 4; critical failure on the target plus ten, the natural 17, or the natural 18.

Easy.description: Easy skill default — base attribute minus 4.

Average.description: Average skill default — base attribute minus 5.

Hard.description: Hard skill default — base attribute minus 6.

VeryHard.description: Very Hard skill — no default; must be learned. Base attribute minus 9 once trained at 1 point.

attributes.name: Strength
attributes.description: Muscle power and bulk. Drives HP, damage, lifting capacity, and any physical activity that depends on raw force.

attributes.name: Dexterity
attributes.description: Agility, co-ordination, and reaction speed. Underlies most active physical skills and Basic Speed.

attributes.name: Intelligence
attributes.description: Brainpower, alertness, and adaptability. Default for Will, Perception, and most mental skills.

attributes.name: Health
attributes.description: Endurance, resistance to illness and poison, and the body's reserve. Drives FP and recovery.

skills.name: Acrobatics
skills.description: Tumbling, balance, and athletic feats. Hard skill; default DX-6.

skills.name: Area Knowledge
skills.description: Familiarity with a specific region's people, places, and customs. Easy skill; default IQ.

skills.name: Brawling
skills.description: Unarmed striking. Easy skill; defaults to DX.

skills.name: Camouflage
skills.description: Conceal an object or oneself by blending into surroundings. Easy skill; default IQ-4.

skills.name: Climbing
skills.description: Scale walls, ropes, and natural features. Average skill; default DX-5.

skills.name: Driving
skills.description: Operate a ground vehicle (specify type on the character sheet). Average skill; default DX-5.

skills.name: Electronics Operation
skills.description: Use a specific category of electronic gear. Average skill; default IQ-5.

skills.name: First Aid
skills.description: Stop bleeding and stabilise injuries in the field. Easy skill; default IQ-4.

skills.name: Forensics
skills.description: Apply scientific method to crime-scene evidence. Hard skill; default IQ-6.

skills.name: Gunner
skills.description: Operate a vehicle-mounted or heavy weapon. Easy skill; default DX-4.

skills.name: Guns
skills.description: Fire portable firearms (specify category on the character sheet). Easy skill; default DX-4.

skills.name: Knife
skills.description: Wield a knife in melee or thrown. Easy skill; default DX-4.

skills.name: Lockpicking
skills.description: Open a lock without its key. Average skill; default IQ-5.

skills.name: Mechanic
skills.description: Maintain and repair a class of machine (specify on the character sheet). Average skill; default IQ-5.

skills.name: Navigation
skills.description: Find one's way using maps, instruments, or natural cues. Average skill; default IQ-5.

skills.name: Observation
skills.description: Notice details about the environment, people, or activity. Average skill; default Per-5.

skills.name: Riding
skills.description: Control a mount (specify type on the character sheet). Average skill; default DX-5.

skills.name: Shadowing
skills.description: Follow a person without being noticed. Average skill; default IQ-5.

skills.name: Stealth
skills.description: Move quietly and remain unseen. Average skill; default DX-5.

skills.name: Streetwise
skills.description: Navigate criminal and underground social networks. Average skill; default IQ-5.

skills.name: Survival
skills.description: Live off the land in a specific environment. Average skill; default Per-5.

skills.name: Swimming
skills.description: Stay afloat and move through water. Easy skill; default HT-4.

skills.name: Throwing
skills.description: Hurl an object at a target accurately. Hard skill; default DX-3.

skills.name: Tracking
skills.description: Follow a trail through outdoor or urban terrain. Average skill; default Per-5.

derivedStats.name: Hit Points
derivedStats.formula: Equal to ST at baseline; modifiable by Extra HP advantages

derivedStats.name: Fatigue Points
derivedStats.formula: Equal to HT at baseline; modifiable by Extra FP advantages

derivedStats.name: Will
derivedStats.formula: Equal to IQ at baseline; covers mental fortitude and resistance

derivedStats.name: Perception
derivedStats.formula: Equal to IQ at baseline; the sense-based attribute used for awareness rolls

derivedStats.name: Basic Move
derivedStats.formula: Basic Speed rounded down; the number of yards moved in a step

derivedStats.name: Dodge
derivedStats.formula: Basic Speed + 3, rounded down; the active defence against attacks

values.label: Healthy
values.description: Above 1/3 of HP. No injury penalties.

values.label: Reeling
values.description: Below 1/3 of HP. Move and Dodge halved (round up).

values.label: Collapse Risk
values.description: At 0 HP or below. Roll HT each turn to stay conscious.

values.label: Unconscious
values.description: Failed a consciousness check, knocked out, or HP at -1xHP.

values.label: Mortally Wounded
values.description: HP at -1xHP or worse. Roll HT to avoid death; each subsequent multiple is a fresh roll.

values.label: Dead
values.description: Failed a death check, or HP at -5xHP.

values.label: Fresh
values.description: Above 1/3 of FP. No fatigue penalties.

values.label: Tired
values.description: Below 1/3 of FP. Move, Dodge, and ST halved (round up).

values.label: Exhausted
values.description: FP at 0. Cannot do anything strenuous without losing HP instead.

values.label: Collapse
values.description: FP below 0. Unconsciousness imminent without rest.

values.label: Crouching
values.description: -2 to hit in melee; smaller target for ranged attackers.

values.label: Prone
values.description: -4 to hit; -3 to active defences. Half move only.

values.label: Stunned
values.description: Cannot defend actively this turn. Roll IQ or HT each turn to recover.
